data.title: Standard Chartered Executes Share Buy-Back to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
Standard Chartered ( (GB:STAN) ) has shared an announcement.

Standard Chartered PLC has announced the purchase of 1,530,000 of its ordinary shares as part of a share buy-back programme. The shares were bought at a volume-weighted average price of 885.2286 GB pence, with plans to cancel them, reducing the total number of shares in issue to 2,378,098,501. This move is part of the company’s strategy to manage its capital structure and return value to shareholders, aligning with regulatory requirements.

More about Standard Chartered

Standard Chartered PLC is a leading international banking group, incorporated in England and Wales. The company operates in the financial services industry, offering a range of banking products and services, with a focus on emerging markets and a strong presence in Asia, Africa, and the Middle East.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.title: Bank of Ireland to Redeem Outstanding Securities
data.description:
Bank Of Ireland Group plc ( (DE:BIRG) ) has shared an update.

Bank of Ireland Group plc announced its intention to redeem €168,789,000 of its outstanding Fixed Rate Reset Additional Tier 1 Perpetual Contingent Temporary Write-Down Securities on 19 May 2025, following regulatory approval. This move follows a previous tender offer where €506,211,000 of the securities were acquired and cancelled. The redemption will result in the cancellation of the securities and cessation of interest payments, with a request for delisting from Euronext Dublin. This action reflects the company’s strategic financial management and impacts stakeholders by altering the securities’ status and associated financial obligations.

More about Bank Of Ireland Group plc

Bank of Ireland Group plc operates in the financial services industry, offering a range of banking products and services primarily focused on retail and commercial banking. The company is a significant player in the Irish market, providing services such as loans, mortgages, and savings products to individuals and businesses.

YTD Price Performance: 5.85%

Average Trading Volume: 9,898

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €9.15B

data.title: NOMURA Co. Announces Leadership Transition
data.description:
The latest update is out from NOMURA Co ( (JP:9716) ).

NOMURA Co., Ltd. has announced a change in its leadership with the retirement of Shuji Enomoto from his position as Representative Director, Chairperson of the Board, and CEO, effective after the 88th Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders on May 22, 2025. Enomoto will transition to an advisory role within the company, indicating a strategic shift in leadership while maintaining his expertise within the organization.

data.description:
The latest update is out from Caledonia Investments PLC ( (GB:CLDN) ).

Caledonia Investments PLC announced the repurchase of 4,974 of its own ordinary shares at an average price of 3374.37 pence per share, which will subsequently be cancelled. This transaction adjusts the company’s issued share capital to 52,792,339 ordinary shares with voting rights, reflecting Caledonia’s ongoing strategy to manage its share capital effectively.

data.title: Ocean Harvest Technology Group Reports Robust Q1 Growth and Minimal Tariff Impact
data.description:
An update from Ocean Harvest Technology Group Plc ( (GB:OHT) ) is now available.

Ocean Harvest Technology Group Plc reported strong growth in the first quarter of 2025, with revenues expected to increase by 65% year-on-year, driven by the return of large customers and new client acquisitions. The company is expanding its market presence by registering its OceanFeed products in 10 new markets across Latin America and the Middle East, while the recent U.S. import tariffs are anticipated to have minimal financial impact, as the U.S. market constitutes less than 2% of the company’s forecasted revenue.

More about Ocean Harvest Technology Group Plc

Ocean Harvest Technology Group Plc is a global leader in the development and commercialization of proprietary seaweed-based products, focusing on natural additives that enhance animal performance and sustainability in the animal feed industry. The company sources seaweed sustainably from around the world and produces its products in Vietnam, catering to the $40 billion animal feed additive market globally.

data.title: Nahar Spinning Mills Ensures Compliance with SEBI Regulations
data.description:
Nahar Spinning Mills Ltd ( (IN:NAHARSPING) ) has issued an update.

Nahar Spinning Mills Ltd has submitted a certificate to the stock exchange as per SEBI regulations for the quarter ending March 2025. The certificate confirms that physical share certificates received for dematerialization have been verified, mutilated, and canceled, with the depository’s name substituted as the registered owner. This compliance ensures transparency and accuracy in the company’s shareholding records, reinforcing its commitment to regulatory standards.

More about Nahar Spinning Mills Ltd

Nahar Spinning Mills Ltd operates in the textile industry, primarily focusing on the production of yarns and fabrics. The company is a significant player in the textile market, catering to both domestic and international markets with a range of high-quality textile products.
